text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, my plan was a total success!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone fell for my ruse and ended up super
shocked! I felt like I was on top of the world
there!
choice_data_list:
We've got to come up with a strategy for the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wonder if I'll bag myself another easy victory.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're gonna be donning our thinking
caps, we might as well wear them while we do
some fishing tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I'm not angling to slack off for the sake
of slacking off here. I've gotta do what I can to
make everyone underestimate me, right? Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky chuckles, but I can't tell whether she's
joking or not...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, yeah... But what kind to go with next time?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I'm getting excited just thinking about
how dumbfounded everyone's gonna be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm really going to take their breath away with my
next glorious scheme. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Seiun Sky has already started
plotting her next win.
